question: Count the total number of tweet IDs in `en`. "en" is the language and refers to Lang = 'en'
evidence: "en" is the language and refers to Lang = 'en'
SQL: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE Lang = 'en'
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE Lang = 'en'

question: Is 3751 the location ID for tweet with ID tw-682714048199311366? "tw-682714048199311366" is the TweetID
SQL: SELECT LocationID FROM twitter WHERE TweetID = 'tw-682714048199311366'
query: SELECT LocationID FROM twitter WHERE TweetID = 'tw-682714048199311366'

question: How many tweets have been posted on Wednesday? "Wednesday" is the Weekday
SQL: SELECT COUNT(TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE Weekday = 'Wednesday'
query: SELECT COUNT(TweetID) FROM twitter WHERE Weekday = 'Wednesday'

question: List down all of the texts posted on Twitter on Thursday. "Thursday" is the Weekday
SQL: SELECT text FROM twitter WHERE Weekday = 'Thursday'
query: SELECT text FROM twitter WHERE Weekday = 'Thursday'

question: What is the gender of the user who posted a tweet with ID tw-682714583044243456? "tw-682714583044243456" is the TweetID
SQL: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.TweetID = 'tw-682714583044243456'
query: SELECT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.TweetID = 'tw-682714583044243456'

question: List down the text of tweets posted by unknown gender users. unknown gender user refers to Gender = 'Unknown'
evidence: unknown gender user refers to Gender = 'Unknown'
SQL: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Unknown'
query: SELECT T1.text FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Unknown'

question: Calculate the total number of male tweet IDs. "Male" is the Gender
SQL: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male'
query: SELECT COUNT(T1.TweetID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Male'

question: What gender of users posted the most tweets in `en`? "en" is the language and refers to Lang = 'en'; most tweet in 'en' refers to Max(Count(text where Lang = 'en'))
evidence: "en" is the language and refers to Lang = 'en'; most tweet in 'en' refers to Max(Count(text where Lang = 'en'))
SQL: SELECT T.Gender FROM ( SELECT T2.Gender, COUNT( text) AS num FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.Lang = 'en' GROUP BY T2.Gender ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1
query: SELECT T.Gender FROM ( SELECT T2.Gender, COUNT( text) AS num FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.Lang = 'en' GROUP BY T2.Gender ) T ORDER BY T.num DESC LIMIT 1

question: What gender of users retweet more than 30 times? retweet more than 30 times refers to RetweetCount > 30
evidence: retweet more than 30 times refers to RetweetCount > 30
SQL: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.RetweetCount > 30
query: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Gender FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T1.RetweetCount > 30

question: How many female users reshared their tweets? female users refers to Gender = 'Female'; reshare refers to IsReshare = 'TRUE'
evidence: female users refers to Gender = 'Female'; reshare refers to IsReshare = 'TRUE'
SQL: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Female' AND T1.IsReshare = 'TRUE'
query: SELECT COUNT(T1.UserID) FROM twitter AS T1 INNER JOIN user AS T2 ON T1.UserID = T2.UserID WHERE T2.Gender = 'Female' AND T1.IsReshare = 'TRUE'
